data.body: STORY F ff6f committed 6e254c8c5 (author Joe Oakhart <joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com>, rebar-ticket + Change-Id + DCO ok) stacked on story A's e3c86fd33 (change 699 PS2). Pushed to Gerrit as change 702 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/702), chained on 699. Awaiting LLM-Review + Verified on 702. Plan: on 702 Verified+1 -> close F -> close epic -> submit stack top (702 submits 699 too).
